name: Tyler Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugars and cornstarch in a bowl.
2. Gradually add milk and cook until slightly thickened.
3. Add butter and egg yolks; bring to a boil.
4. Remove from heat, then stir in beaten egg whites, vanilla, and nutmeg.
5. Pour mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
6. Bake at 325°F (165°C) until firm and brown, about 30-35 minutes.
